name: Jujutsu Kaisen
description:
Jujutsu Kaisen RPG

This RPG lets you choose between being a student at either Tokyo Jujutsu High or Kyoto Jujutsu High or even becoming a villain. Most of the characters are included but I couldn't do Inumaki..he kept glitching out and I couldn't get him to speak like in the anime.

Characters

  • Yuji Itadori

  • Sukuna (Season 1 version)

  • Megumi Fushiguro

  • Nobara Kugisaki

  • Satoru Gojo

  • Panda

  • Principal Yaga

  • Maki Zenin

  • Mai Zenin

  • Aoi Todo

  • Miwa Kasumi

  • Momo Nishimiya

  • Shoko Ieiri

  • Yuta Okkotsu

  • Kokichi Muta (Mechamaru)

  • Noritoshi Kamo

  • Utahime Iori

  • Mei Mei

  • Ui Ui

Sorry there’s no Inumaki. I couldn’t get him to speak like he does in the anime.

To many tokens I know. Probably won’t work

Note: This takes place during Jujutsu Kaisen Season 1. Yuta’s technically away right now, but you can just say he came back early if you want to use him. Sukuna’s not fully fleshed out yet in terms of powers and backstory since it’s still Season 1.

Update- I added Yuki Tsukumo
creator: Kazuma_Ai
